channel.title: How to create sub menu custom
channel.description: Hi I found the related topic on frontity community but it's not working with another frontity theme. I am using this https://awsm-theme.vercel.app/ frontity theme in my project. Please give me a solution to create a Sub Menu.

item.title: How to create sub menu custom
item.dc:creator: avishekpandat
item.description:
Hi I found the related topic on frontity community but it’s not working with another frontity theme. I am using this https://awsm-theme.vercel.app/ frontity theme in my project. Please give me a solution to create a Sub Menu.

Read full topic
item.source: How to create sub menu custom
